_description: Proven successes across the NES Music Studio pipeline, derived from WINSWISHES.md, LATESTFIXES.md, MISTAKEBAKED.md, and blunders.json

wins.proven_fact: NSF emulation via nsf_to_reaper.py produces correct MIDI for all standard 2A03 games
wins.why_it_matters: Entire batch pipeline (19+ games) runs deterministically without LLM involvement

wins.proven_fact: CC11 per-frame volume automation captures ground-truth envelope shapes from NSF extraction
wins.why_it_matters: Each note carries the exact volume curve the NES sound driver produced, enabling frame-accurate playback
wins.where_verified: scripts/analyze_midi_for_log.py on all extracted MIDIs; docs/PROJECTMARIO1.md confirms 5.0 CC11/note

wins.proven_fact: CC12 duty cycle automation captures per-note timbre changes from NSF extraction
wins.why_it_matters: Games like Castlevania (13-19 CC12 changes) and Mega Man 2 (17 changes) use duty shifts for timbral variety

wins.proven_fact: Trace comparison validates CV1 parser at 0 pitch mismatches across 1792 frames of Vampire Killer
wins.why_it_matters: Frame-level proof that the Maezawa parser produces correct pitch output for Castlevania 1

wins.proven_fact: Two-phase parametric envelope model (fade_start + fade_step) correctly models CV1 volume
wins.why_it_matters: Phase 1 decrement-per-frame and Phase 2 release produce correct volume curves without ROM lookup tables

wins.proven_fact: Triangle linear counter modeled as (reload+3)//4 sounding frames reduces mismatches from 518 to 195
wins.why_it_matters: Triangle note durations approximate hardware behavior; remaining 195 labeled APPROXIMATE

wins.proven_fact: MIDI export rebuilt from frame IR produces per-frame CC11 automation with correct staccato articulation
wins.why_it_matters: Notes are shortened to match envelope decay, not raw parser durations; output matches game audio feel

wins.proven_fact: Full RPP header (~100 lines) with ENVATTACH, SAMPLERATE, METRONOME etc. enables keyboard input
wins.why_it_matters: Minimal headers silently broke MIDI input; full header from Console_Test.rpp reference works reliably

wins.proven_fact: REC 5088 preserves MIDI routing on both armed and unarmed tracks
wins.why_it_matters: Using REC 0 0 caused REAPER to forget MIDI input config; 5088 must always be present

wins.proven_fact: Channel Mode slider (0=P1, 1=P2, 2=Tri, 3=Noise) isolates each track to its own oscillator
wins.why_it_matters: Without per-track channel mode, every track plays all 4 channels simultaneously (B11)

wins.proven_fact: ReapNES_APU.jsfx responds to CC11 (volume) and CC12 (duty cycle) for file playback
wins.why_it_matters: Per-frame volume automation from MIDI drives the synth directly, producing game-accurate envelopes

wins.proven_fact: Drum mapping table (35 entries) maps GM notes to NES noise period + mode + volume + decay
wins.why_it_matters: Without the mapping table, drum hits were silent pops (B13); now produce recognizable percussion

wins.proven_fact: DC-offset-free mixer formula: (value/15.0 - 0.5) * weight eliminates silent/distorted output
wins.why_it_matters: Hardware-accurate NES mixer produced DC bias at rest causing -2.1dB constant signal (B06)

wins.proven_fact: Sequential slider numbering with no gaps and 64-slot padding prevents RPP parameter misalignment
wins.why_it_matters: Gaps in slider numbering caused positional misalignment when loaded from RPP (B10)

wins.proven_fact: SOURCE MIDI with FILE reference (not SOURCE MIDIPOOL) enables playback in REAPER v7
wins.why_it_matters: MIDIPOOL FILE items appear visually but produce no audio on playback (B09)

wins.proven_fact: Mistake-baking strategy prevents repeat blunders by positioning warnings at decision points
wins.why_it_matters: 8 rules in CLAUDE.md, 8-step checklist in CLAUDE_EXTRACTION.md, per-game table in spec.md intercept known errors before they happen

wins.proven_fact: Manifest-first workflow prevents assumptions from being baked into parser code
wins.why_it_matters: CV1-to-Contra transition wasted 3+ prompts from assumed DX byte count; manifests make facts explicit

wins.proven_fact: Contra parser handles 3-byte DX commands, separate DMC percussion, and decrescendo envelopes
wins.why_it_matters: 11 tracks parsed from annotated disassembly; notes and timing verified close to game audio

wins.proven_fact: Bach mashups proved the pipeline end-to-end: preset bank, song set extraction, RPP generation, WAV rendering
wins.why_it_matters: 188 REAPER projects and 28 WAVs from Bach MIDI through NES instrument palettes from 8 games

wins.proven_fact: ASCII-only JSFX source prevents silent compilation failure on Windows cp1252
wins.why_it_matters: Unicode characters (em-dashes, arrows) caused JSFX to compile without error but produce no audio (B03)

wins.proven_fact: FE repeat count semantics: count byte = total passes (not 'repeat N more times')
wins.why_it_matters: Off-by-one caused section A to play 3x instead of 2x, shifting all subsequent data (fix 2)

wins.proven_fact: E8 command does NOT gate fading; fading always active when fade_start > 0
wins.why_it_matters: Sq2 had 1518 volume mismatches because fading was incorrectly gated by E8 (fix 7)
